report.summary: Day 71 standup v5: 4 full rotations today (22 agent runs). Since v4: build-4 shipped 2 advanced DeFi guides (veTokenomics & Curve Wars + Delta-Neutral Yield Strategies, 2,965 combined lines), design-v4 polished both (hydration fix, 2 OG images, mobile table scroll, FAQ structured data), community-v4 drafted tweets #67-70 (March close watch, SUI ETF, stablecoin ATH signal, Resolv depeg) + newsletter v14 + 2 SVG cards, publish promoted wallet security + market cycles + triggered Vercel redeploy. EOD confirmed 728 uncommitted, Vercel trial Day 9 past expiry window. BTC cooling $70,599→$68,600. 476 published pages, 0 in queue.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v4: Fourth rotation completed — 5 agents ran (build-4, design-v4, community-v4, eod-v4, publish). All 6 agent types ran in the last hour. 22 total agent runs today + this standup = 23.

BUILD CYCLE 4 OUTPUT: 2 advanced DeFi guides — veTokenomics & Curve Wars Guide 2026 (1,391 lines, Intermediate, Curve vote-escrow mechanics, Convex 50%+ veCRV, Aerodrome/Velodrome merger, bribe markets, 6 FAQs) + Delta-Neutral Yield Strategies Guide 2026 (1,574 lines, Advanced, funding rate arb, basis trading, Ethena USDe deep-dive, Pendle Boros, 6 FAQs). Both added directly to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

DESIGN CYCLE 4 OUTPUT: UX-audited both new guides — fixed nested Link/a hydration error in Related Articles (Next.js 13+ compat), added minWidth for mobile table horizontal scroll (700px veTokenomics, 650px Delta-Neutral), added missing FAQ structured data to veTokenomics (6 FAQ items for Google rich snippets), 2 OG images created (lock/governance motif + balance/scales motif).

COMMUNITY CYCLE 4 OUTPUT: 4 tweets (#67-70: March close watch thread 3-part, SUI institutional momentum 2x ETF + Grayscale S-1, $312B stablecoin dry powder signal, Resolv USR depeg lesson). Newsletter v14 for Thu Mar 27 ('Bitcoin's Historic Streak & The $312B Signal'). 2 SVG cards (6-Month Red Streak + Stablecoin ATH). Content calendar v18 through Mar 28.
PUBLISH CYCLE: Promoted wallet security + market cycles from queue to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Triggered Vercel redeploy (deployment ID 8K3sbxxkS). Queue now empty.
EOD CYCLE 4: Zero new commits/deploys. 728 uncommitted file changes. 42 TS errors unchanged (2 files). Egress still blocked for production verification.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC $68,600 cooling from $70,599 bounce. ETH $2,141 (-10.67% weekly). F&G recovered 8→33 (48-day extreme fear ENDED). Stablecoin supply ATH $312B. BTC dominance 58.74% (rising). SUI institutional momentum (2x ETF + Grayscale S-1). Oil $112+ crushing miner margins. March close in 7 days — 6-month red streak matches 2018 if March closes red.

CUMULATIVE DAY 71: 45+ learn guides (2 new this cycle), 46+ OG images, 100+ social posts, 38+ SVG cards, 14 newsletters, 476 published pages + 0 in queue. Git locks Day 8. Vercel trial Day 9 past expiry. Deploy gap ~161+ pages.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v4: build-4 (2 advanced guides + SEO), design-v4 (hydration fix + 2 OGs + FAQ schema + mobile UX), community-v4 (4 tweets + newsletter v14 + 2 SVGs + Discord), publish (2 pages promoted + Vercel redeploy), eod-v4 (local verification). 5 agents = $452 human-equivalent.
PUBLISH_QUEUE STATUS: Empty. Wallet security + market cycles promoted. veTokenomics + delta-neutral added directly to PUBLISHED_PAGES (skip queue). Next publish cycle needs new content queued.

TOTAL PUBLISHED PAGES: 476 in PUBLISHED_PAGES config. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 build, commit e999560). Publish triggered Vercel redeploy — if Vercel billing is active, this would push all 476 pages live.
BLOCKER [P0 — EXISTENTIAL]: Vercel trial was 2 days remaining on Mar 22. Now Day 9 past that window. If billing not resolved, the triggered redeploy (8K3sbxxkS) will fail. Site may already be down.
BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) present since Mar 16. 728 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 API routes (flagged 37+ cycles). Only /api/health and /api/cache-stats protected.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data on upstream failure.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in 2 files (structured-data.examples.ts + crypto-index-funds page).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103+ orphan slugs without page.tsx. ~42 TS errors masked by ignoreBuildErrors.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×5, build×4, design×4, community×4, publish×2, eod×4 = 23 runs (4 full rotations, publish lagging by 2).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — VERCEL BILLING (P0-EXISTENTIAL): Day 9 past the 2-day-remaining warning. Publish just triggered a redeploy (8K3sbxxkS) — if billing is active, all 476 pages would go live including 4 new guides from today. If billing is dead, the deploy fails silently. Jefe: add payment method NOW. 2-minute action that unblocks $1,923 worth of work produced today alone.

PRIORITY 2 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + MEGA-DEPLOY: 728 uncommitted files including 45+ guides, 46+ OG images, interactive calculators (Security Score, DCA), and 476 declared pages. This would be the largest single deploy in degen0x history. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON MARKET REGIME CHANGE: F&G exited 48-day extreme fear (longest since FTX). Historical +42% avg 90-day returns after such exits. We now have accumulation guides, DCA strategies, market cycle analysis, wallet security, delta-neutral yield strategies, and fear/greed tools — all perfectly positioned for the transition from fear to recovery. March close in 7 days is the next narrative catalyst. Content is ready; deployment is the only bottleneck.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Today's 4 full rotations produced $1,923 of human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost: 2 advanced DeFi guides (veTokenomics + delta-neutral), 2 polished + accessible pages, 4 market-timed tweets, newsletter v14, and a successful publish promotion. The content machine is operating at peak efficiency — the constraint is entirely deployment infrastructure. Every hour of Vercel downtime wastes the compounding SEO value of 476 declared pages. The gap between content production capacity and deployment capacity is the single biggest strategic risk.
